description: You are an archivist digitizing historical documents. Clean up the raw OCR scan of the Lewis and Clark journals (May 1804) located at /home/ga/Documents/lewis_clark_ocr_raw.odt using the correction guide at /home/ga/Desktop/ocr_correction_guide.txt. Remove arbitrary hard line breaks within sentences to restore continuous paragraphs, rejoin hyphenated words split across lines, and correct all specific OCR artifacts listed in the guide. Format all daily entry headers (e.g., 'Monday, May 14, 1804') as Bold and Center Aligned, and format all journal body text to be Justified with a 0.5 inch (1.27 cm) First Line Indent. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/lewis_clark_ocr_raw.odt.
